title: Questions from Quarantine: Vaccine Priorities and 2021
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public questions submitted with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, airing every Tuesday, aims to provide guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the ongoing global health crisis. The specific article focuses on the topic of vaccine priorities and the outlook for 2021, situating this discussion within the broader context of public health security and pandemic response. It serves as a platform for expert advice and public engagement on critical issues related to the coronavirus pandemic.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周举办一次网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，回答公众通过#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交的问题。该系列节目每周二播出，旨在为持续的全球健康危机期间如何保持身心健康提供指导。本文具体聚焦于疫苗优先次序和2021年展望这一主题，并将此讨论置于公共卫生安全和疫情应对的更广泛背景中。它是一个关于冠状病毒大流行相关关键问题的专家建议和公众参与平台。
